grants.opportunity_title: Investing in the Indigenous Arts Ecology Investing in the Indigenous Arts Ecology examines the impact and evolution of First Peoples Fund’s work over 25 years to develop greater access to the resources Native artists need to succeed. It pro
grants.eligibility_text: Investing in the Indigenous Arts Ecology Investing in the Indigenous Arts Ecology examines the impact and evolution of First Peoples Fund’s work over 25 years to develop greater access to the resources Native artists need to succeed. It provides insight into how to best contribute to growing and thriving arts ecosystems in Native communities. EXPLORE THE RESEARCH >>
